title: Package-relative path resolution uses import.meta.dirname in 3 sites — undefined under tsx-CJS dist-load; normalize to fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)
description: import.meta.dirname is undefined when a built dist/*.js (type:module) is loaded under tsx's CJS-interop path (tsx -e / subpath import) — proven during B2 where samples-catalog.ts's module-top import.meta.dirname threw ERR_INVALID_ARG_TYPE and was fixed to path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)) (idiom already at project-context.ts:220/433, samples-catalog.ts:34, schema-validator.ts:47, pi-jit-agents/trace-writer.ts:40). Three sites still use import.meta.dirname: (a) pi-workflows/src/bundled-dirs.ts:14 MODULE-TOP-LEVEL (eager) PACKAGE_ROOT = path.resolve(import.meta.dirname, '..') — same eager pattern that broke samples-catalog (highest risk: throws at import under tsx-CJS); (b) pi-context/src/index.ts:335 installProject samplesRoot (lazy, inside fn); (c) pi-context/src/update-check.ts:20 getInstalledVersion (lazy, inside fn). Lazy sites are prod-ESM-safe but latent under tsx-CJS-if-called; eager bundled-dirs.ts:14 is the genuine risk. Codebase already standardizes on fileURLToPath(import.meta.url) in 5 places.

evidence.reference: PACKAGE_ROOT = path.resolve(import.meta.dirname, '..') EAGER module-top; same pattern that threw in samples-catalog under tsx-CJS
installProject samplesRoot import.meta.dirname — lazy, prod-ESM-safe, latent under tsx-CJS
getInstalledVersion import.meta.dirname — lazy, prod-ESM-safe, latent under tsx-CJS

impact: No production breakage today (prod loads dist as native ESM; 2 pi-context sites lazy). Risks: bundled-dirs.ts:14 eager-module-top throws if that pi-workflows module loads via any tsx-CJS-interop path (orchestrator tsx -e / some harnesses) — the exact B2 failure class; and inconsistency with the established idiom invites repeating the B2 defect. P3 — no current failing path, cheap to normalize, removes a latent footgun.
proposed_resolution: Replace all 3 import.meta.dirname package-relative resolutions with path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)) (idiom in 5 existing sites). Prioritize bundled-dirs.ts:14 (eager = actual risk). Add fileURLToPath import from node:url where absent. Verify each touched module resolves its package-relative dir under native-ESM AND a tsx -e import probe. Mechanical, no prod behavior change; route through plan mode per feedback_no_adhoc_dev. Consider a biome guard to prevent reintroduction. [CLOSED 2026-05-23 — commit dfa0fc6 / TASK-061 / VER-033: 3 shipped-src import.meta.dirname sites (update-check, index installProject, pi-workflows bundled-dirs EAGER) converted to path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)).]
